modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be a few minor typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Computer frozen on startup and won't turn on.

full_description_text: 
Came in today, found my HP EliteDesk 800 G3 unresponsive. It’s stuck on the loading screen. Power is fine, surge protector works. No signs of life from the computer at all. Windows 10 should be booting, but nothing happens.
short_description: Computer frozen on startup and won't turn on.
description: Came in today, found my HP EliteDesk 800 G3 unresponsive. It’s stuck on the loading screen. Power is fine, surge protector works. No signs of life from the computer at all. Windows 10 should be booting, but nothing happens.
